clusters.title: The 40 minutes when the Artemis crew loses contact with the Earth
clusters.neutral_headline: The 40 minutes when the Artemis crew loses contact with the Earth

items.title: The 40 minutes when the Artemis crew loses contact with the Earth
items.standfirst: As the astronauts pass behind the Moon they will experience a moment of silence and solitude as communication with the Earth is blocked.
items.content: As the astronauts pass behind the Moon they will experience a moment of silence and solitude as communication with the Earth is blocked.

clusters.title: 'Two weeks will make such a difference': UK first as NI brings in miscarriage leave
clusters.neutral_headline: 'Two weeks will make such a difference': UK first as NI brings in miscarriage leave

items.title: 'Two weeks will make such a difference': UK first as NI brings in miscarriage leave
items.standfirst: Northern Ireland becomes first part of UK to bring in legal entitlement for parents affected by miscarriage at any stage of a pregnancy to have paid leave.
items.content: Northern Ireland becomes first part of UK to bring in legal entitlement for parents affected by miscarriage at any stage of a pregnancy to have paid leave.

clusters.title: Artemis II astronauts have toilet trouble on their way towards the Moon
clusters.neutral_headline: Artemis II astronauts have toilet trouble on their way towards the Moon

items.title: Artemis II astronauts have toilet trouble on their way towards the Moon
items.standfirst: The four astronauts aboard the Artemis II mission's Orion capsule have encountered intermittent complications with their spacecraft's toilet.
items.content: The four astronauts aboard the Artemis II mission's Orion capsule have encountered intermittent complications with their spacecraft's toilet.

items.standfirst: The story behind the beautiful pictures beamed back to Earth from the Artemis II astronauts.

items.title: 'Absolutely spectacular': Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon
items.standfirst: Astronauts on the Artemis II mission are on the third day of their journey around the far side of the Moon.
items.content: Astronauts on the Artemis II mission are on the third day of their journey around the far side of the Moon.

items.title: What's happening next in the Artemis II mission?
items.standfirst: Artemis II is now on a looping path that will carry the crew around the far side of the Moon and back again.
items.content: Artemis II is now on a looping path that will carry the crew around the far side of the Moon and back again.
